name: gofakeit (Random Fake Data Generator for Go)

performance.notes: Pure Go; very fast data generation

agent_readiness.notes: Comprehensive fake data library for Go. gofakeit.Name(), Email(), Phone(), Address(), Company(), URL(), UUID(), Password(). 200+ data generators. gofakeit.Struct(&obj) to fill struct fields. Struct tags: fake:"{name}" for auto-population. Seed for reproducible data. Custom generators. Global faker or New(seed) for isolated instance. More comprehensive than faker-go. Used for test fixtures, database seeding, API mocking.

gotchas: Global gofakeit functions are not goroutine-safe without seeding (use New())
Struct tags work with exported fields only
Generated data not cryptographically secure (not for security use)
Large structs with nested types need careful tag configuration
best_when: Go test fixtures needing realistic fake data
API mock responses with realistic-looking data
avoid_when: Production data (fake data only for testing)
summary: gofakeit is the most comprehensive fake data generator for Go. 200+ generators: Name, Email, Phone, Address, UUID, Password, Credit Card, etc. gofakeit.Struct(&obj) auto-fills structs via fake struct tags. Seeded for reproducible data. Isolated instances with New(seed). Used for test fixtures, DB seeding, API mocks. The Faker.js equivalent for Go.
